message:
feat(e2e): migrate dashboard background suite to asupersync runtime

Replace raw std::thread::spawn with asupersync's RuntimeBuilder
blocking pool for the e2e dashboard suite runner. This aligns the
dashboard with the project's shared async runtime and gives structured
task lifecycle via BlockingTaskHandle. Adds spawn_background_task and
spawn_suite_background helpers, plus a unit test verifying the
blocking pool executes tasks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
